decisions.title: Commit to CSRS (Column-Store Read Service) as primary data path
decisions.context: Multiple CSRS tickets (ENG-10157, ENG-9989, ENG-9493, ENG-9986, ENG-10117) indicate migration from legacy DLv2. Shadow comparison issues suggest dual systems creating complexity. Need decision on deprecation timeline for DLv2.

arguments.for: CSRS enables 5M pts/sec target (ENG-10150), better deduplication (ENG-10157), supports new parquet schema. Reduces technical debt.
arguments.against: Active shadow comparison false negatives. Customer impact risk if cutover premature. Resource split between two systems slows both.

decisions.title: Prioritize FedRAMP/GovCloud deployment over core feature work
decisions.context: ENG-10156 (AWS workspace provisioning), ENG-9939 (Windmill GovCloud), ENG-9846 (FIPS compliance) indicate government customer requirements. Conflicts with Explore V2 (ENG-4589, ENG-10158) and Canvas work.
decisions.blockedBy: Resource allocation - teams split between compliance and product features

arguments.for: Government contracts high-value, long sales cycles mean delays costly. Compliance table-stakes for market entry. Moat-building.
arguments.against: Core product improvements (Explore V2 dimension selection, Canvas spotlight) directly increase North Star metric. FedRAMP doesn't improve decisions captured for existing customers.

decisions.title: Invest in Sift Edge GUI vs. headless-only deployment
decisions.context: ENG-9883 (Edge GUI Table View) suggests UI development. Edge devices traditionally headless. Unclear customer demand signal vs. internal assumption.
decisions.blockedBy: Customer validation - no referenced user research

arguments.for: GUI lowers barrier for edge deployment, enables non-technical operators. Embed Deeper pillar - makes Sift accessible at data source.
arguments.against: Edge environments often lack displays. Development effort high. ENG-9436 (lock contention bug) suggests core stability should come first.

decisions.title: Standardize on ConnectRPC for streaming vs. maintaining multiple protocols
decisions.context: ENG-10124 adds ConnectRPC for streaming. Existing gRPC infrastructure (ENG-10150 backend-grpc). Protocol proliferation increases maintenance burden.

arguments.for: ConnectRPC better browser support, simpler client code. Modern standard. Consolidation reduces long-term maintenance.
arguments.against: Migration effort across services. Backend-grpc already scaled to 5M pts/sec. Two protocols during transition period increases complexity.

decisions.title: Fix Grafana sharelink breakage (ENG-10093) as P0 vs. planned work
decisions.context: Integration with Grafana broken. Signals existing customers using cross-tool workflows. No severity/customer impact data in ticket.

arguments.for: Broken integrations erode trust. Sharelinks core to collaboration workflow. Quick fix likely - should interrupt sprint.
arguments.against: Unknown customer impact. May be low-usage feature. Planned work on CSRS, load testing, FedRAMP all strategically critical.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 30 engineering tickets active across 4 major initiatives (CSRS migration, FedRAMP, Explore V2, Edge). Team fragmentation high - no clear swim lanes.
alerts: Decision debt accumulating: CSRS vs DLv2, FedRAMP priority, Edge GUI investment - all unresolved
5 SPIKEs in flight (ENG-9425, ENG-9423 catalog, others) - research phase extending, execution delayed
Shadow comparison issues (ENG-10117) blocking CSRS confidence - needs dedicated troubleshooting time
Grafana integration broken (ENG-10093) - customer-facing issue, no urgency signal in backlog
